curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff of PR #14115 (merge commit fcfce1b). The patch adds FfiPermissions type parameter, permission checks, and check_unstable calls to op_ffi_call_ptr and op_ffi_call_ptr_nonblocking in ext/ffi/lib.rs. These two functions were the only FFI ops completely missing both permission enforcement and unstable API gating — other FFI ops (op_ffi_ptr_of, op_ffi_buf_copy_into, op_ffi_cstr_read, op_ffi_read_*) already had permission checks but were only missing the unstable gate. The init function was also updated to register these two ops with the FfiPermissions type parameter. Pre-assigned class auth-bypass confirmed: the vulnerability allows bypassing Deno's permission model to execute arbitrary native code via ungated FFI operations.
